text: Inside this building, the white walls and sharp lines give rise to a sterile, almost clinical calm. Yet as I peer through the glass into a vibrant and tactfully designed exhibit, I sense a subtle tension between the outside's chill order and the inside's creative warmth. The words on the display echo my own uncertainty here: exposed, eager to understand, caught between intention and perception. I feel a quiet vulnerability, yet also a curiosity about the interplay of visibility and meaning in this space.
